action.reasoning: Observation: Best EER improved to 0.0858 (from 0.094) using WavLM-large + stats-pool + MLP (dropout=0.3), mild waveform aug (gain ~[-3,3]dB + low noise p=0.3), wd=1e-3, cosine scheduler over 12 epochs; dev EER reaches ~0.0 rapidly with train loss ~0.003 (metrics confirm quick convergence). Analysis: Severe overfitting to seen attacks A01-A06; insufficient robustness to test distribution shift (unseen A07-A19, telephony codecs, new speakers). Stronger aug (wider gain, random SNR noise), higher dropout=0.5, increased wd=5e-3, lower lr=5e-6 + longer 15-epoch schedule should improve OOD generalization without changing architecture. predict.py and saving logic already functional. Decision: Incrementally update model.py (dropout), train.py (aug strength, hypers, scheduler T_max=15), keep predict.py; run full training then submit_eval to get next EER and stay within time/iter budget (~2h per run, 3.9h left).
